name: Calculadora de Grava Decorativa
seo_title: Calculadora de Grava – Toneladas y Metros Cúbicos
seo_description: Calcula cuántas toneladas y metros cúbicos de piedra decorativa necesitas. Introduce las dimensiones del área, la profundidad y el tipo de piedra.
description: Calculadora 1119. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
mistakes: Spreading rock too thin — under 3 cm allows weeds to push through
Skipping landscape fabric — rocks sink into soil without a barrier
Using the wrong rock size — 10–20 mm is standard for decorative gravel
formula_display: Area = L × W; Volume = area × depth; Weight = volume × density
